CFIC Mailing List

April 1998
Government & Politics

Instructions for subscribing to the newly formed CFIC listserv by sending an email to majordomo@campaignfinance.org with specific subscription commands.

To subscribe to the newly formed CFIC listserv, send an e-mail to majordomo@campaignfinance.org. In the body of the message, type subscribe CFIC-L yourname <your e-mail address>.
